articles.content: Its always painful to witness your shiny new iPhone 17 Pro Max endure excessive wear and tear, to the extent that becomes prominently damaged with visible bumps, scratches, and other blemishes that r… [+1618 chars]

articles.title: Gemini can now create personalized AI images by digging around in Google Photos - Ars Technica
articles.description: Google is making it easier to feed your photos into Nano Banana for more personal image generation.
